Programs

Tracks for AI, online learning, and innovation.

Each pathway is designed to be practical, student-friendly, and strong enough to support future academic or career goals.

AI

AI Engineering

Python, data, machine learning concepts, AI tools, ethics, and applied technical projects.

Online

Online School Pathway

A structured online school experience with academic accountability, coaching, and clear progress.

Startup

Innovation & Entrepreneurship

Product ideas, startup thinking, pitch development, digital strategy, and real-world problem solving.

Research

Research & Capstone

Student-led projects, technical writing, demonstrations, and portfolio-ready outcomes.

Creative

Creative AI & Media

Digital storytelling, design, content creation, responsible generative AI, and presentation skills.

Future

College & Career Readiness

Guidance for applications, profiles, interviews, communication, and long-term planning.

AI School

A future-ready education branch for artificial intelligence, online learning, innovation, and student portfolio development.
